On this page

  • Topics

Categories
All (13)
machine-learning (13)
neural-networks (13)

Advanced Learning Algorithms

Course 2 notes on neural networks, decision trees, and practical advice for building machine learning systems in the Andrew Ng specialization.

Topics

Course 2 of 3 in the Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng (DeepLearning.AI / Stanford).

You finished Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification in Course 1. This track picks up with neural networks (also called deep learning), then practical system-building advice, and finally decision trees.

Notes

These pages follow the Coursera videos and labs, rewritten for high school readers with review questions and plots where they help.

Neural Networks Intuition

machine-learning
neural-networks

Course 2 Week 1 in one page: welcome, biological motivation, demand prediction, layers, activations, multi-layer architecture, and face recognition intuition (formal model math appended here as the course continues).

Jul 9, 2026

Neural Network Model

machine-learning
neural-networks

Forward pass math for a four-layer neural network, covering the general activation formula, the layer-index superscript notation, and the input-as-layer-zero convention.

Jul 10, 2026

Forward Propagation

machine-learning
neural-networks

The forward propagation algorithm for neural network inference, worked through a handwritten digit recognition example with a 64-25-15-1 network.

Jul 10, 2026

TensorFlow Implementation

machine-learning
neural-networks

Forward propagation as real TensorFlow code, plus how NumPy matrices, row and column vectors, and TensorFlow tensors represent the same data differently.

Jul 10, 2026

Neural Networks in NumPy

machine-learning
neural-networks

Forward propagation from scratch in NumPy, first hardcoded neuron by neuron, then generalized into a single reusable dense layer function.

Jul 11, 2026

Lab: Handwritten Digit Recognition

machine-learning
neural-networks

A real neural network trained on 1000 real handwritten digit images to tell zeros from ones, built with the same Sequential pattern from the previous pages.

Jul 11, 2026

Training Neural Networks

machine-learning
neural-networks

The three-step TensorFlow pattern for training a neural network, specify the model, compile it with a loss function, and fit it to data.

Jul 12, 2026

Activation Functions

machine-learning
neural-networks

How ReLU, linear, and sigmoid activations work, and how to choose them for the output layer and the hidden layers of a neural network.

Jul 13, 2026

Multiclass Classification

machine-learning
neural-networks

Classification problems where the label can take more than two values, such as recognizing all ten digits, diagnosing several diseases, or spotting different defect types.

Jul 14, 2026

Additional Neural Network Concepts

machine-learning
neural-networks

The Adam optimization algorithm for faster training, and the convolutional layer, where each neuron reads only a window of the input.

Jul 14, 2026

Lab: Handwritten Digit Recognition (Multiclass)

machine-learning
neural-networks

A softmax neural network trained on 5000 real handwritten digit images to recognize all ten digits, 0 through 9, with a prediction grid and a look at its mistakes.

Jul 14, 2026

Model Evaluation and Selection

machine-learning
neural-networks

How to evaluate a trained model with a train/test split, and how to choose between models with a cross-validation set without fooling yourself.

Jul 14, 2026

Bias and Variance

machine-learning
neural-networks

Diagnosing underfitting and overfitting with J_train and J_cv, the classic bias-variance curve against polynomial degree, and how a model can have both problems at once.

Jul 15, 2026
No matching items
